description: Create an inverted finding chart for the Eagle Nebula core using the raw FITS file at '~/AstroImages/finding_charts/raw/656nmos.fits'. Crop the image to 500x500 pixels with the top-left corner at X=550, Y=550. Adjust the brightness and contrast to make the pillar structures clearly visible. The image must be inverted so that stars and the nebula are dark against a white background. Include a visual marker at the tip of the largest pillar near the center and a flattened text annotation reading 'M16 Core'. Export the final finding chart as a PNG to '~/AstroImages/finding_charts/output/m16_finding_chart.png'.
